---
title: "CM 2026 - Week 10"
author: "Maurits van der Does de Willebois"
date: "2026-02-27"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: darkly
    orientation: columns
---

# Welcome to week 10 of Computational Musicology 2026!

## Column {width=40%}

### Row {height=20%}

::: {.card}
Hello world
:::

## Column {width=40%}

### Row {height=20%}

::: {.card}
Hello world
:::

### Row {height=60%}

::: {.card}
Hello world
:::
